Case Studies

The results that changed the game.

Practical AI systems, workflow automation, and conversational products designed to create measurable operational gains.

AI customer support transformation

A web and WhatsApp assistant resolved frequent questions, captured qualified leads, and routed complex requests to the right team.

A secure legal intake and contract review assistant reduced manual review pressure and improved compliance visibility.

A multilingual voice agent handled repetitive customer calls and escalated complex cases with full conversation context.

Industries

Deep industry knowledge meets smart technology.

We build AI systems around sector-specific workflows, compliance expectations, data structures, and customer journeys.

01

Healthcare & Lifesciences

Secure AI systems for clinical documentation, patient intake, appointment workflows, claims support, and compliant healthcare operations.

  • Patient triage
  • Clinical summarization
  • Claims support
Explore industry
02

Finance, Banking & Insurance (BFSI)

AI-led automation for document processing, KYC, fraud triage, underwriting, customer support, and regulated financial workflows.

  • Fraud triage
  • Claims automation
  • KYC enrichment
Explore industry
03

E-Commerce & Retail

Conversational commerce, intelligent support, product recommendations, returns automation, and customer journey optimization.

  • Personalized support
  • Order management
  • Returns automation
Explore industry
04

Legal & Professional Services

AI contract review, intake automation, knowledge assistants, case research, compliance checks, and professional service workflows.

  • Contract review
  • Case intake
  • Knowledge search
Explore industry
05

Logistics & Supply Chain

AI workflows for route optimization, inventory visibility, shipment support, warehouse operations, and exception management.

  • Route planning
  • Inventory agents
  • Shipment support
Explore industry
06

Real Estate & PropTech

Lead qualification, property inquiry automation, appointment scheduling, CRM updates, and AI assistants for real estate teams.

  • Lead qualification
  • Viewing schedules
  • Property FAQs
Explore industry

Services

Building the future of your business, today.

Your existing service pages are now reflected directly on the homepage. Each capability links to its dedicated page and keeps Velar Info's AI-first positioning intact.

AIUXCloud

Delivery Model

From business problem to working AI system.

Discovery and workflow mapping
Secure AI architecture
Production deployment and support

AI Chatbots & Virtual Assistants

Deploy intelligent chatbots that handle customer queries, support tickets, and lead generation — 24/7, across WhatsApp, Web, and Mobile.

Explore service

AI Agents & Workflows

Connect people, data, and tools with AI agents that automate approvals, documents, tickets, and multi-step workflows.

Explore service

Voice & Conversational AI

Deploy AI voice agents and conversational assistants for calls, chat, lead qualification, and customer support.

Explore service

Generative AI Services

Build enterprise-ready AI assistants, content engines, and knowledge tools powered by secure generative AI models.

Explore service

Custom AI Development

Need something unique? We build custom AI models, NLP engines, and LLM-powered applications tailored to your exact business logic.

Explore service

AI Consulting & Integration

Not sure where to start? Our AI consultants audit your processes, identify automation opportunities, and roadmap your AI journey.

Explore service

Process

We build with intent, and it shows in the rollout.

A clear path from discovery to scale keeps stakeholders aligned, technical risk visible, and business outcomes measurable.

01
DISCOVER

Discover

We audit your business workflows and identify the highest-impact AI opportunities.

02
BUILD

Build

Our team designs, trains, and integrates your custom AI solution — chatbot, voice bot, or automation pipeline.

03
SCALE

Scale

Go live, measure results, and continuously improve with real-time analytics and ongoing AI support.

Solutions

The results that change the way teams work.

Velar designs AI systems around your operating model, industry constraints, and the teams who need to use them every day.

01

Enterprises & Large Corporates

Scale AI across departments — customer support, HR, finance, and operations.

  • ✓Multi-department AI agents
  • ✓Enterprise-grade security & compliance
  • ✓Integration with SAP, Salesforce, Oracle
  • ✓Dedicated implementation team
02

SMBs & Startups

Affordable, fast-to-deploy AI tools that give small teams the power of large enterprises.

  • ✓Ready-to-use chatbot templates
  • ✓WhatsApp & website bot integration
  • ✓Pay-as-you-grow pricing
  • ✓Onboarding in under 7 days
03

Government & Public Sector

AI built for citizen services, public grievance handling, and government workflows.

  • ✓Multilingual chatbots (Hindi + regional languages)
  • ✓Grievance redressal automation
  • ✓Secure on-premise deployment options
  • ✓Compliant with government data policies

Why Velar

Built for real deployment, not showroom AI.

We focus on measurable workflows, India-first language needs, and practical integration choices that make AI easier to adopt.

Feature
Velar Info
Typical Vendors
India-first AI approach
Yes, Hindi + English
Mostly English only

Template-based only

Yes, compliant
Rarely available

Dedicated team
Ticket-based only

Available
